ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit for the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was published */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the product image */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "product_status" TEXT /* Status of the product (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product based on customer reviews */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES subcategories ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the product subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "subcategory_description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subcategory was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subcategory details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "restock_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was restocked */,
  "low_stock_threshold" INTEGER /* Low stock threshold for the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the stock level falls below the threshold */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory record was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, purchase) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for tracking user interactions */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent information (e.g., browser, device) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event occurred */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_access_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supplier was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supplier details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, successful) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipment" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address for shipping */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date when the shipment was sent */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the shipment (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shipment was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shipment details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipment_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
